codeReview.summary: The fix fully resolves the prior blocking stale-port assertion: test_integration_vllm_orphan_adoption now derives the configured port via a local test_port variable and asserts against that same value. The same variable-based pattern was also applied in test_integration_vllm_start_stop, reducing future mismatch risk.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton, handoff, rust-backend skill, and commit diff. The original blocking finding from the prior review is addressed completely, and no new blocking or non-blocking issues were found.
